mapper.sql: id, ticket_no, title, description, ticket_type, category, priority, status, creator_id, assignee_id, group_id, queue_id, solution_summary, source, idempotency_key, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM ticket WHERE id = #{id} AND (creator_id = #{userId} OR assignee_id = #{userId})
SELECT FROM ticket WHERE creator_id = #{creatorId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT FROM ticket WHERE assignee_id = #{assigneeId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM ticket WHERE assignee_id = #{assigneeId} AND status IN ('PENDING_ASSIGN', 'PROCESSING', 'RESOLVED')
SELECT FROM ticket WHERE status = #{status.code} ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE ticket SET assignee_id = #{assigneeId} WHERE id = #{id} AND status = #{expectedStatus.code}
UPDATE ticket SET group_id = #{groupId}, queue_id = #{queueId} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE ticket SET priority = #{priority.code} WHERE id = #{id}
